findings.summary: The Prisma unique constraint for alert delivery idempotency initially relied on Prisma's generated name instead of the migration's explicit index name.
findings.resolution: Added the explicit Prisma map name `alert_deliveries_idempotency_key_key`.

rationale: The migration is expand-only, preserves legacy SavedSearch rows, constrains Phase 07 alert channel/status/drop values, and has PGlite schema coverage plus Prisma validation.
next_action: Proceed to canonical saved-search contract slice.
